title: RawImportRow
description: One row in the _raw_import staging sheet. Append-only on row creation; status/audit columns are update-in-place.

raw_import_id.description: Unique id. Format: RAW-{source_job_id_hash10}-{seq6}. Deterministic within a job. Immutable.

source_portal.description: Copy of portal from job input, denormalized for filtering without join. Immutable.

source_url.description: URL of the business detail page on the portal. With source_job_id forms the row idempotency key. Immutable.

scraped_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of extraction. Immutable.

raw_payload_json.description: Full raw scrape output for this one record as a JSON string. Content shape defined by A-04 scraper. Immutable.

normalized_status.description: Technical lifecycle state. See spec section 3.

normalization_error.description: Technical error message. Non-null only when import_decision = rejected_error.

duplicate_candidate.description: TRUE if dedupe found any match (hard or soft).

duplicate_of_lead_id.description: FK to LEADS.lead_id of matched lead for hard duplicates. null for soft dup or non-duplicate.

lead_id.description: FK to LEADS.lead_id after successful import. Non-null only in 'imported' status.

import_decision.description: Business decision. null until decided. See spec section 4.

updated_at.description: Last modification timestamp of any mutable column. Equals created_at at insert.

processed_by.description: Writer component that last modified the row.
